theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of |Blobtest| is an algebraic definition, written |Blobtest| =⇒ Injection. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from I, n, j, c, o, defining |Blobtest|. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
